query:
-- SPR101 Lesson 6: Spiritual Warfare and Prayer (750029)
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(750029, 'According to Ephesians 6:12 who do we wrestle against?', 'multiple_choice', '["Flesh and blood","Principalities and powers","Other believers","Ourselves"]', 'Principalities and powers', 1),
(750029, 'What is the primary weapon of spiritual warfare according to Ephesians 6:17-18?', 'multiple_choice', '["Physical strength","The sword of the Spirit and prayer","Money","Political power"]', 'The sword of the Spirit and prayer', 2),
(750029, 'What does binding and loosing refer to in Matthew 18:18?', 'multiple_choice', '["Physical restraints","Spiritual authority in prayer","Legal contracts","Church membership"]', 'Spiritual authority in prayer', 3),
(750029, 'How did Jesus respond to Satans temptations in Matthew 4?', 'multiple_choice', '["With physical force","With Scripture","With silence","With compromise"]', 'With Scripture', 4),
(750029, 'What does 2 Corinthians 10:4 say about our weapons?', 'multiple_choice', '["They are carnal","They are mighty through God","They are ineffective","They are physical"]', 'They are mighty through God', 5),
(750029, 'What is the significance of the name of Jesus in spiritual warfare?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is a magic word","It carries divine authority","It is optional","It has no power"]', 'It carries divine authority', 6),
(750029, 'According to James 4:7 what happens when we resist the devil?', 'multiple_choice', '["He attacks harder","He flees from us","He ignores us","He negotiates"]', 'He flees from us', 7),
(750029, 'What role does praise play in spiritual warfare according to 2 Chronicles 20?', 'multiple_choice', '["No role","It confuses the enemy and brings victory","It is entertainment","It is optional"]', 'It confuses the enemy and brings victory', 8),
(750029, 'What does putting on the full armor of God mean?', 'multiple_choice', '["Wearing special clothes","Being spiritually prepared and protected","Physical training","Military service"]', 'Being spiritually prepared and protected', 9),
(750029, 'How should believers approach spiritual warfare according to Scripture?', 'multiple_choice', '["With fear","With confidence in Christ","With aggression","With avoidance"]', 'With confidence in Christ', 10),
(750029, 'Explain the relationship between prayer and spiritual authority in the believers life.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Prayer activates spiritual authority given by Christ to overcome enemy forces', 11),

-- SPR101 Lesson 7: Corporate Prayer and Prayer Movements (750030)
(750030, 'What happened when the early church prayed together in Acts 4:31?', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing","The place was shaken and they were filled with the Holy Spirit","They fell asleep","They argued"]', 'The place was shaken and they were filled with the Holy Spirit', 1),
(750030, 'According to Matthew 18:19-20 what is the power of agreement in prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["It has no special power","Whatever two agree on will be done","It creates confusion","It is discouraged"]', 'Whatever two agree on will be done', 2),
(750030, 'What is a prayer meeting?', 'multiple_choice', '["A business meeting","Believers gathering specifically to pray together","A social event","A lecture"]', 'Believers gathering specifically to pray together', 3),
(750030, 'How did the church respond to Peters imprisonment in Acts 12?', 'multiple_choice', '["They gave up","They prayed earnestly for him","They ignored it","They protested"]', 'They prayed earnestly for him', 4),
(750030, 'What is a prayer chain?', 'multiple_choice', '["A piece of jewelry","A network of people praying in sequence for urgent needs","A prison","A type of rosary"]', 'A network of people praying in sequence for urgent needs', 5),
(750030, 'What role did corporate prayer play in the Great Awakenings?', 'multiple_choice', '["No role","It preceded and sustained revival","It hindered revival","It was forbidden"]', 'It preceded and sustained revival', 6),
(750030, 'What is a prayer vigil?', 'multiple_choice', '["A funeral service","Extended period of continuous prayer","A protest","A party"]', 'Extended period of continuous prayer', 7),
(750030, 'According to Acts 1:14 how did the disciples prepare for Pentecost?', 'multiple_choice', '["By studying","By praying together with one accord","By traveling","By sleeping"]', 'By praying together with one accord', 8),
(750030, 'What is the 24-7 prayer movement?', 'multiple_choice', '["A TV channel","Continuous prayer coverage around the clock","A fitness program","A news network"]', 'Continuous prayer coverage around the clock', 9),
(750030, 'Why is unity important in corporate prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is not important","It releases greater power and agreement","It causes problems","It is optional"]', 'It releases greater power and agreement', 10),
(750030, 'Describe the biblical basis for corporate prayer and its effectiveness.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Acts 2 and 4 show corporate prayer brings Holy Spirit power and answered prayer', 11),

-- SPR101 Lesson 8: Contemplative Prayer and Listening to God (750031)
(750031, 'What does it mean to be still and know that I am God in Psalm 46:10?', 'multiple_choice', '["To be lazy","To quiet oneself and recognize Gods sovereignty","To stop praying","To be inactive"]', 'To quiet oneself and recognize Gods sovereignty', 1),
(750031, 'How did Elijah hear God in 1 Kings 19:12?', 'multiple_choice', '["In the earthquake","In the fire","In a still small voice","In the wind"]', 'In a still small voice', 2),
(750031, 'What is meditation in the biblical sense?', 'multiple_choice', '["Emptying the mind","Filling the mind with Gods Word and truth","Eastern mysticism","Sleeping"]', 'Filling the mind with Gods Word and truth', 3),
(750031, 'According to John 10:27 what do Jesus sheep do?', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignore His voice","Hear His voice and follow Him","Run away","Make noise"]', 'Hear His voice and follow Him', 4),
(750031, 'What is the purpose of silence in prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["To waste time","To create space to hear from God","To avoid praying","To be bored"]', 'To create space to hear from God', 5),
(750031, 'How did Samuel learn to hear Gods voice in 1 Samuel 3?', 'multiple_choice', '["Through a dream","Through Elis instruction to respond Speak Lord","Through a vision","Through an angel"]', 'Through Elis instruction to respond Speak Lord', 6),
(750031, 'What is lectio divina?', 'multiple_choice', '["A type of food","A practice of prayerful Scripture reading","A musical instrument","A language"]', 'A practice of prayerful Scripture reading', 7),
(750031, 'How can believers test what they hear in prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["They cannot test it","By comparing it to Scripture and seeking confirmation","By ignoring it","By acting immediately"]', 'By comparing it to Scripture and seeking confirmation', 8),
(750031, 'What does Habakkuk 2:1 teach about waiting on God?', 'multiple_choice', '["Dont wait","Position yourself to watch and listen for Gods response","Give up quickly","Complain"]', 'Position yourself to watch and listen for Gods response', 9),
(750031, 'Why is journaling helpful in contemplative prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is not helpful","It helps record and discern what God is saying","It wastes paper","It is required"]', 'It helps record and discern what God is saying', 10),
(750031, 'Explain how to balance speaking and listening in prayer.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Prayer should include both talking to God and quiet listening for His response', 11),

-- SPR101 Lesson 9: Prayer and Revival (750032)
(750032, 'What does 2 Chronicles 7:14 say is required for God to heal the land?', 'multiple_choice', '["Political change","Humble prayer seeking Gods face and turning from sin","Military victory","Economic prosperity"]', 'Humble prayer seeking Gods face and turning from sin', 1),
(750032, 'What role did prayer play in the Welsh Revival of 1904?', 'multiple_choice', '["No role","Evan Roberts and others prayed fervently for revival","It hindered revival","It was forbidden"]', 'Evan Roberts and others prayed fervently for revival', 2),
(750032, 'According to James 5:17-18 how did Elijahs prayer affect the weather?', 'multiple_choice', '["It had no effect","His prayer stopped and started the rain","He controlled the weather","He predicted the weather"]', 'His prayer stopped and started the rain', 3),
(750032, 'What is the connection between repentance and revival?', 'multiple_choice', '["No connection","Repentance prepares hearts for Gods reviving work","Repentance prevents revival","They are opposites"]', 'Repentance prepares hearts for Gods reviving work', 4),
(750032, 'How did the Moravians contribute to revival through prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["They didnt pray","They maintained 100 years of continuous prayer","They opposed prayer","They prayed once a year"]', 'They maintained 100 years of continuous prayer', 5),
(750032, 'What does it mean to pray down revival?', 'multiple_choice', '["To stop revival","To persistently pray until God sends spiritual awakening","To pray against revival","To pray quietly"]', 'To persistently pray until God sends spiritual awakening', 6),
(750032, 'According to Psalm 85:6 what does the psalmist ask God to do?', 'multiple_choice', '["Punish the people","Revive us again","Leave us alone","Forget us"]', 'Revive us again', 7),
(750032, 'What characterized the prayer meetings before the Azusa Street Revival?', 'multiple_choice', '["Brief and formal","Intense fervent and prolonged","Quiet and short","Rare and scattered"]', 'Intense fervent and prolonged', 8),
(750032, 'How does personal revival relate to corporate revival?', 'multiple_choice', '["No relation","Personal revival often precedes and sparks corporate revival","They are unrelated","Personal revival prevents corporate revival"]', 'Personal revival often precedes and sparks corporate revival', 9),
(750032, 'What is the role of desperation in revival prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is unhealthy","It creates urgency and dependence on God","It should be avoided","It is sinful"]', 'It creates urgency and dependence on God', 10),
(750032, 'Describe the historical pattern of prayer preceding major revivals.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Every major revival was preceded by intense sustained prayer by individuals or groups', 11),

-- SPR101 Lesson 10: Developing a Lifestyle of Prayer (750033)
(750033, 'What does pray without ceasing in 1 Thessalonians 5:17 mean practically?', 'multiple_choice', '["Never stop talking","Maintain constant communion with God throughout the day","Pray 24 hours literally","Only pray in church"]', 'Maintain constant communion with God throughout the day', 1),
(750033, 'How can believers practice the presence of God?', 'multiple_choice', '["By ignoring God","By being aware of Gods presence in all activities","By only praying in church","By avoiding daily life"]', 'By being aware of Gods presence in all activities', 2),
(750033, 'What is breath prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["Breathing exercises","Short prayers repeated throughout the day","Holding your breath","Yoga"]', 'Short prayers repeated throughout the day', 3),
(750033, 'According to Colossians 4:2 how should believers approach prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["Casually","Devoting themselves to it with thanksgiving","Rarely","Only in emergencies"]', 'Devoting themselves to it with thanksgiving', 4),
(750033, 'What is the benefit of praying at set times during the day?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is legalistic","It creates rhythm and consistency in prayer life","It is unnecessary","It limits God"]', 'It creates rhythm and consistency in prayer life', 5),
(750033, 'How did Daniel maintain his prayer life despite persecution?', 'multiple_choice', '["He stopped praying","He continued praying three times daily","He prayed secretly only","He compromised"]', 'He continued praying three times daily', 6),
(750033, 'What is the role of thanksgiving in a lifestyle of prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is optional","It cultivates gratitude and faith","It is unnecessary","It replaces petition"]', 'It cultivates gratitude and faith', 7),
(750033, 'How can believers turn everyday activities into prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["They cannot","By offering each activity to God and maintaining awareness of Him","By stopping all activities","By only doing religious activities"]', 'By offering each activity to God and maintaining awareness of Him', 8),
(750033, 'What does abiding in Christ mean for prayer according to John 15:7?', 'multiple_choice', '["Living disconnected from Christ","Remaining in close relationship enables effective prayer","Occasional connection","Physical location"]', 'Remaining in close relationship enables effective prayer', 9),
(750033, 'Why is consistency more important than intensity in prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is not more important","Regular prayer builds relationship while sporadic intensity fades","Intensity is all that matters","Neither matters"]', 'Regular prayer builds relationship while sporadic intensity fades', 10),
(750033, 'Describe practical ways to integrate prayer into daily routines.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Pray during commute meals breaks and set specific times for focused prayer', 11);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute -- SPR101 Lesson 6: Spiritual Warfare and Prayer (750029)
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(750029, 'According to Ephesians 6:12 who do we wrestle against?', 'multiple_choice', '["Flesh and blood","Principalities and powers","Other believers","Ourselves"]', 'Principalities and powers', 1),
(750029, 'What is the primary weapon of spiritual warfare according to Ephesians 6:17-18?', 'multiple_choice', '["Physical strength","The sword of the Spirit and prayer","Money","Political power"]', 'The sword of the Spirit and prayer', 2),
(750029, 'What does binding and loosing refer to in Matthew 18:18?', 'multiple_choice', '["Physical restraints","Spiritual authority in prayer","Legal contracts","Church membership"]', 'Spiritual authority in prayer', 3),
(750029, 'How did Jesus respond to Satans temptations in Matthew 4?', 'multiple_choice', '["With physical force","With Scripture","With silence","With compromise"]', 'With Scripture', 4),
(750029, 'What does 2 Corinthians 10:4 say about our weapons?', 'multiple_choice', '["They are carnal","They are mighty through God","They are ineffective","They are physical"]', 'They are mighty through God', 5),
(750029, 'What is the significance of the name of Jesus in spiritual warfare?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is a magic word","It carries divine authority","It is optional","It has no power"]', 'It carries divine authority', 6),
(750029, 'According to James 4:7 what happens when we resist the devil?', 'multiple_choice', '["He attacks harder","He flees from us","He ignores us","He negotiates"]', 'He flees from us', 7),
(750029, 'What role does praise play in spiritual warfare according to 2 Chronicles 20?', 'multiple_choice', '["No role","It confuses the enemy and brings victory","It is entertainment","It is optional"]', 'It confuses the enemy and brings victory', 8),
(750029, 'What does putting on the full armor of God mean?', 'multiple_choice', '["Wearing special clothes","Being spiritually prepared and protected","Physical training","Military service"]', 'Being spiritually prepared and protected', 9),
(750029, 'How should believers approach spiritual warfare according to Scripture?', 'multiple_choice', '["With fear","With confidence in Christ","With aggression","With avoidance"]', 'With confidence in Christ', 10),
(750029, 'Explain the relationship between prayer and spiritual authority in the believers life.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Prayer activates spiritual authority given by Christ to overcome enemy forces', 11),

-- SPR101 Lesson 7: Corporate Prayer and Prayer Movements (750030)
(750030, 'What happened when the early church prayed together in Acts 4:31?', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing","The place was shaken and they were filled with the Holy Spirit","They fell asleep","They argued"]', 'The place was shaken and they were filled with the Holy Spirit', 1),
(750030, 'According to Matthew 18:19-20 what is the power of agreement in prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["It has no special power","Whatever two agree on will be done","It creates confusion","It is discouraged"]', 'Whatever two agree on will be done', 2),
(750030, 'What is a prayer meeting?', 'multiple_choice', '["A business meeting","Believers gathering specifically to pray together","A social event","A lecture"]', 'Believers gathering specifically to pray together', 3),
(750030, 'How did the church respond to Peters imprisonment in Acts 12?', 'multiple_choice', '["They gave up","They prayed earnestly for him","They ignored it","They protested"]', 'They prayed earnestly for him', 4),
(750030, 'What is a prayer chain?', 'multiple_choice', '["A piece of jewelry","A network of people praying in sequence for urgent needs","A prison","A type of rosary"]', 'A network of people praying in sequence for urgent needs', 5),
(750030, 'What role did corporate prayer play in the Great Awakenings?', 'multiple_choice', '["No role","It preceded and sustained revival","It hindered revival","It was forbidden"]', 'It preceded and sustained revival', 6),
(750030, 'What is a prayer vigil?', 'multiple_choice', '["A funeral service","Extended period of continuous prayer","A protest","A party"]', 'Extended period of continuous prayer', 7),
(750030, 'According to Acts 1:14 how did the disciples prepare for Pentecost?', 'multiple_choice', '["By studying","By praying together with one accord","By traveling","By sleeping"]', 'By praying together with one accord', 8),
(750030, 'What is the 24-7 prayer movement?', 'multiple_choice', '["A TV channel","Continuous prayer coverage around the clock","A fitness program","A news network"]', 'Continuous prayer coverage around the clock', 9),
(750030, 'Why is unity important in corporate prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is not important","It releases greater power and agreement","It causes problems","It is optional"]', 'It releases greater power and agreement', 10),
(750030, 'Describe the biblical basis for corporate prayer and its effectiveness.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Acts 2 and 4 show corporate prayer brings Holy Spirit power and answered prayer', 11),

-- SPR101 Lesson 8: Contemplative Prayer and Listening to God (750031)
(750031, 'What does it mean to be still and know that I am God in Psalm 46:10?', 'multiple_choice', '["To be lazy","To quiet oneself and recognize Gods sovereignty","To stop praying","To be inactive"]', 'To quiet oneself and recognize Gods sovereignty', 1),
(750031, 'How did Elijah hear God in 1 Kings 19:12?', 'multiple_choice', '["In the earthquake","In the fire","In a still small voice","In the wind"]', 'In a still small voice', 2),
(750031, 'What is meditation in the biblical sense?', 'multiple_choice', '["Emptying the mind","Filling the mind with Gods Word and truth","Eastern mysticism","Sleeping"]', 'Filling the mind with Gods Word and truth', 3),
(750031, 'According to John 10:27 what do Jesus sheep do?', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignore His voice","Hear His voice and follow Him","Run away","Make noise"]', 'Hear His voice and follow Him', 4),
(750031, 'What is the purpose of silence in prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["To waste time","To create space to hear from God","To avoid praying","To be bored"]', 'To create space to hear from God', 5),
(750031, 'How did Samuel learn to hear Gods voice in 1 Samuel 3?', 'multiple_choice', '["Through a dream","Through Elis instruction to respond Speak Lord","Through a vision","Through an angel"]', 'Through Elis instruction to respond Speak Lord', 6),
(750031, 'What is lectio divina?', 'multiple_choice', '["A type of food","A practice of prayerful Scripture reading","A musical instrument","A language"]', 'A practice of prayerful Scripture reading', 7),
(750031, 'How can believers test what they hear in prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["They cannot test it","By comparing it to Scripture and seeking confirmation","By ignoring it","By acting immediately"]', 'By comparing it to Scripture and seeking confirmation', 8),
(750031, 'What does Habakkuk 2:1 teach about waiting on God?', 'multiple_choice', '["Dont wait","Position yourself to watch and listen for Gods response","Give up quickly","Complain"]', 'Position yourself to watch and listen for Gods response', 9),
(750031, 'Why is journaling helpful in contemplative prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is not helpful","It helps record and discern what God is saying","It wastes paper","It is required"]', 'It helps record and discern what God is saying', 10),
(750031, 'Explain how to balance speaking and listening in prayer.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Prayer should include both talking to God and quiet listening for His response', 11),

-- SPR101 Lesson 9: Prayer and Revival (750032)
(750032, 'What does 2 Chronicles 7:14 say is required for God to heal the land?', 'multiple_choice', '["Political change","Humble prayer seeking Gods face and turning from sin","Military victory","Economic prosperity"]', 'Humble prayer seeking Gods face and turning from sin', 1),
(750032, 'What role did prayer play in the Welsh Revival of 1904?', 'multiple_choice', '["No role","Evan Roberts and others prayed fervently for revival","It hindered revival","It was forbidden"]', 'Evan Roberts and others prayed fervently for revival', 2),
(750032, 'According to James 5:17-18 how did Elijahs prayer affect the weather?', 'multiple_choice', '["It had no effect","His prayer stopped and started the rain","He controlled the weather","He predicted the weather"]', 'His prayer stopped and started the rain', 3),
(750032, 'What is the connection between repentance and revival?', 'multiple_choice', '["No connection","Repentance prepares hearts for Gods reviving work","Repentance prevents revival","They are opposites"]', 'Repentance prepares hearts for Gods reviving work', 4),
(750032, 'How did the Moravians contribute to revival through prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["They didnt pray","They maintained 100 years of continuous prayer","They opposed prayer","They prayed once a year"]', 'They maintained 100 years of continuous prayer', 5),
(750032, 'What does it mean to pray down revival?', 'multiple_choice', '["To stop revival","To persistently pray until God sends spiritual awakening","To pray against revival","To pray quietly"]', 'To persistently pray until God sends spiritual awakening', 6),
(750032, 'According to Psalm 85:6 what does the psalmist ask God to do?', 'multiple_choice', '["Punish the people","Revive us again","Leave us alone","Forget us"]', 'Revive us again', 7),
(750032, 'What characterized the prayer meetings before the Azusa Street Revival?', 'multiple_choice', '["Brief and formal","Intense fervent and prolonged","Quiet and short","Rare and scattered"]', 'Intense fervent and prolonged', 8),
(750032, 'How does personal revival relate to corporate revival?', 'multiple_choice', '["No relation","Personal revival often precedes and sparks corporate revival","They are unrelated","Personal revival prevents corporate revival"]', 'Personal revival often precedes and sparks corporate revival', 9),
(750032, 'What is the role of desperation in revival prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is unhealthy","It creates urgency and dependence on God","It should be avoided","It is sinful"]', 'It creates urgency and dependence on God', 10),
(750032, 'Describe the historical pattern of prayer preceding major revivals.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Every major revival was preceded by intense sustained prayer by individuals or groups', 11),

-- SPR101 Lesson 10: Developing a Lifestyle of Prayer (750033)
(750033, 'What does pray without ceasing in 1 Thessalonians 5:17 mean practically?', 'multiple_choice', '["Never stop talking","Maintain constant communion with God throughout the day","Pray 24 hours literally","Only pray in church"]', 'Maintain constant communion with God throughout the day', 1),
(750033, 'How can believers practice the presence of God?', 'multiple_choice', '["By ignoring God","By being aware of Gods presence in all activities","By only praying in church","By avoiding daily life"]', 'By being aware of Gods presence in all activities', 2),
(750033, 'What is breath prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["Breathing exercises","Short prayers repeated throughout the day","Holding your breath","Yoga"]', 'Short prayers repeated throughout the day', 3),
(750033, 'According to Colossians 4:2 how should believers approach prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["Casually","Devoting themselves to it with thanksgiving","Rarely","Only in emergencies"]', 'Devoting themselves to it with thanksgiving', 4),
(750033, 'What is the benefit of praying at set times during the day?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is legalistic","It creates rhythm and consistency in prayer life","It is unnecessary","It limits God"]', 'It creates rhythm and consistency in prayer life', 5),
(750033, 'How did Daniel maintain his prayer life despite persecution?', 'multiple_choice', '["He stopped praying","He continued praying three times daily","He prayed secretly only","He compromised"]', 'He continued praying three times daily', 6),
(750033, 'What is the role of thanksgiving in a lifestyle of prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is optional","It cultivates gratitude and faith","It is unnecessary","It replaces petition"]', 'It cultivates gratitude and faith', 7),
(750033, 'How can believers turn everyday activities into prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["They cannot","By offering each activity to God and maintaining awareness of Him","By stopping all activities","By only doing religious activities"]', 'By offering each activity to God and maintaining awareness of Him', 8),
(750033, 'What does abiding in Christ mean for prayer according to John 15:7?', 'multiple_choice', '["Living disconnected from Christ","Remaining in close relationship enables effective prayer","Occasional connection","Physical location"]', 'Remaining in close relationship enables effective prayer', 9),
(750033, 'Why is consistency more important than intensity in prayer?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is not more important","Regular prayer builds relationship while sporadic intensity fades","Intensity is all that matters","Neither matters"]', 'Regular prayer builds relationship while sporadic intensity fades', 10),
(750033, 'Describe practical ways to integrate prayer into daily routines.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Pray during commute meals breaks and set specific times for focused prayer', 11);
